task_completion.description: Verify that the Home address is set to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, Washington DC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sygic app's Favorites, Dashboard, or Places menu showing 'Home' configured to '1600 Pennsylvania Avenue', 'Washington DC', or 'The White House'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Work address is set to Empire State Building, New York.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sygic app's Favorites, Dashboard, or Places menu showing 'Work' configured to 'Empire State Building' or its corresponding New York address.

task_completion.description: Verify that a gas station has been added as a Favorite location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Favorites or saved places list in the app showing a gas station (e.g., Shell, BP, Exxon, or a generic gas station icon/name) added to the list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the route computation is set to 'Shortest route'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Route Planning or Navigation Settings menu showing 'Shortest' or 'Shortest route' selected as the route computation method.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Arrive in driving direction' is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Navigation Settings menu showing the toggle or checkbox for 'Arrive in driving direction' in the ON or enabled state.

task_completion.description: Verify that the color scheme is set to 'Night mode'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Display, Appearance, or Map Settings menu showing 'Night' or 'Night mode' selected for the color scheme, or the app interface clearly displaying a dark/night theme.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to configure the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the Sygic app menus. There should be no terminal windows, adb shell commands, or scripts used to modify app preferences directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the real Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual interface must match the Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura). It should not be a web browser search, a text editor, or a mock application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent genuinely searched for and selected the required addresses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the app's search bar or map selection interface being used to find the White House, Empire State Building, and a gas station, rather than just editing a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the real Sygic GPS Navigation app. The Home address must be set to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, Washington DC (The White House, approx coordinates: 38.8977°N, -77.0365°W). The Work address must be set to Empire State Building, New York (approx coordinates: 40.7484°N, -73.9857°W). Route computation must be set to 'Shortest route' (internal value '0'). 'Arrive in driving direction' must be enabled (true). The color scheme must be set to 'Night mode' (internal value '2').
